rationale: Educ. Code §39.0241 governs performance standards on student assessment instruments and related study guides/teacher training. It contains no provisions related to property tax, homestead exemptions, or school district revenue. No conflict.
quote: The commissioner shall determine the level of performance considered to be satisfactory on the assessment instruments.
_note: No conflict. §39.0241 addresses assessment performance standards and study materials, not taxation or homestead exemptions.
